description: From the manufacturer HEX BOTS Wall Crawler Gecko Creep out friends and family with the HEX BOTS Wall Crawler Gecko! This hyper-realistic robot toy lizard is guaranteed to get a scream out of anyone afraid of creepy crawly insects or bugs! Watch as your Gecko scurries across the floor and scales up walls, just like a real gecko! A full function remote control allows for intuitive play as you can control it just the way you want, and LED light eyes make the Wall Crawler Gecko stand out in the dark! The body is made of hard plastic, with silicone for the limbs and tail! These RC boys toys come with a range of 25 ft (8 m), and 1 USB Cable is included so you can have endless fun with the HEX BOTS crawling toys! Requires 2 AAA Batteries which are not included. These toy robots are essential for your collection of cool toys for kids 6-8 years old. Build your collection of toy figures & playsets, building toys, STEM Toys, RC Cars and fighting games with HEX BOTS robotics! Amazing Innovative design! RECHARGABLE AND EASY TO CONTROL 1 USB cable for charging your Gecko is included so you can have endless fun with this HEX BOTS crawling toy! 2 AAA batteries required for remote (not included). Kids can unleash mechanical mayhem as they control and watch this Gecko scale the walls and ceiling! WALL CRAWLING MOVEMENT Watch the creepy-crawly motion of the Wallcrawler robot toy as it crawls across the floor and climbs up walls, just like a real gecko! Scare your family and friends with the life like movement! FULL FUNCTION REMOTE Easy-to-use remote control allows for intuitive play as users can control up to 25 ft (8 m) and move in all directions. REALISTIC DESIGN This light up toy come with LED eyes that can be seen in the dark, green silicone tail and limbs, and a black plastic body, for a realistic, fun design sure to creep your friends out! This hyper-realistic robot toy lizard is guaranteed to get a scream out of anyone afraid of crawly creatures! HEX Bots Wall Crawler Gecko Easy to use and easy to charge! 1 USB cable for charging your Gecko is included so you can have endless fun with this HEX BOTS crawling toy! 2 AAA batteries required for remote (not included) CONTENTS 1 HEX BOTS Wall Crawler Gecko 1 Remote Control 1 Charging Cable 1 Instruction Guide NOTE: (2 AAA Batteries required for Remote control only, NOT included)
